raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmative self-declaration and commitment to prioritize inner connection as a spiritual practice",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "a stable, knowable 'self' exists that can be connected to or left",
    "breath serves as a reliable anchor to non-physical consciousness or presence",
    "pleasing others constitutes a form of self-abandonment with spiritual consequences",
    "self-connection is a primary commitment that precedes and conditions all other relations"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a set of aligned practices oriented toward a unified priority of self-presence",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the practitioner experiences measurable increases in presence, discernment, and energetic integrity when these commitments are enacted",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the framing of 'self-connection' is used to justify avoidance of relational responsibility or to reify a separate ego-self as ultimately real"
}
